header.description: NOTE!!!: The effects of this imbuement have not yet been automated. You imbue the weapon with creeping darkness. Choose when you first imbue the weapon for the granted spells to be either arcane or divine.

labels.text: The weapon gains a two-action Interact and command activation allowing it to attempt to counteract the light cantrip (but not other light effects) with a counteract rank equal to half the item's level rounded up.
The weapon can cast penumbral shroud once per day.
The weapon can cast darkness once per day
The weapon can cast chilling darkness once per day
The weapon can cast penumbral shroud, darkness and chilling darkness, each once per day, heightened to 4th rank
The weapon can cast penumbral shroud, darkness and chilling darkness, each once per day, heightened to 6th rank
The weapon can cast 9th-level eclipse burst once per day
Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional cold damage as the darkness saps warmth; this additional damage has the darkness trait.
Strikes with the weapon deal 1d4 additional cold damage as the darkness saps warmth; this additional damage has the darkness trait.
Strikes with the weapon deal 1d6 additional cold damage as the darkness saps warmth; this additional damage has the darkness trait.

header.description: NOTE!!!: The effects of this imbuement have not yet been automated. You imbue the weapon with creeping darkness.

labels.text: Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional cold damage as the darkness saps warmth; this additional damage has the darkness trait
Strikes with the weapon deal 1d4 additional cold damage as the darkness saps warmth; this additional damage has the darkness trait
Strikes with the weapon deal 1d6 additional cold damage as the darkness saps warmth; this additional damage has the darkness trait
Strikes with the weapon deal 1d8 additional cold damage as the darkness saps warmth; this additional damage has the darkness trait
The additional cold damage dealt by this imbued property ignores resistances
On a successful Strike with the weapon, before applying the additional cold damage, the target gains weakness 1 to darkness until the beginning of your next turn
On a critical hit, darkness shrouds the target’s vision, causing everything around it to be concealed to it unless it has darkvision
On a critical hit with the weapon, the target must attempt a Fortitude save against the weapon’s DC. On a failure, it’s blinded for 1 round by magical darkness unless it has greater darkvision

header.description: NOTE!!!: The effects of this imbuement have not yet been automated. You imbue the weapon with creeping darkness.

labels.text: Strikes with the weapon deal 1 persistent cold damage as encroaching darkness slowly drains their warmth away; this additional damage has the darkness trait.
Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional cold damage and 1 persistent cold damage as the darkness saps warmth; this additional damage has the darkness trait.
Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional cold damage and 1d6 persistent cold damage as the darkness saps warmth; this additional damage has the darkness trait.
On a critical hit, darkness shrouds the target’s vision, causing everything around it to be concealed to it unless it has darkvision.
Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional cold damage and 1d8 persistent cold damage as the darkness saps warmth; this additional damage has the darkness trait.
Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional cold damage and 1d10 persistent cold damage as the darkness saps warmth; this additional damage has the darkness trait.
The additional damage and persistent cold damage dealt by this imbued property ignores resistances.

On a critical hit, or as long as the target is suffering from the persistent cold damage, darkness shrouds the target’s vision, causing everything around it to be concealed to it unless it has darkvision.

On a critical hit with a weapon, the target must attempt a Fortitude save against the weapon’s DC. On a failure, it’s blinded for 1 round by magical darkness unless it has greater darkvision; even on a success or critical success, everything around it is concealed to it unless it has greater darkvision.

The persistent darkness devours the light. Each time the target takes the persistent cold damage from this property, the darkness attempts to counteract one light effect on the target or the target’s belongings with a counteract rank of 10 and a counteract modifier of +33.
